items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ's "Rapid Recommendations" initiative aims to accelerate the translation of new research into clinical guidelines. Monitor this platform for faster access to evidence-based advice that could impact your practice.

items.title: Study Finds Laparoscopic Sacrocolpopexy Improves Incontinence and Anterior Vaginal Defects
items.summary: A study found that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in women with pelvic organ prolapse and stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术（LSCP）能改善盆腔器官脱垂患者的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。在管理这类患者时，这为您评估手术干预效果提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 研究发现腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术可改善尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术能改善盆腔器官脱垂和压力性尿失禁女性的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy (LSCP) improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in patients with pelvic organ prolapse. This provides a reference for evaluating the effectiveness of surgical interventions when managing these patients.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: Study design not clearly specified, likely an observational study.

items.title: Patient-Controlled ESPB Offers Safe, Effective Alternative to Epidural Analgesia, finds study
items.summary: A new randomized trial suggests that patient-controlled lumbar erector spinae plane block (ESPB) offers a safe and effective alternative to patient-controlled epidural analgesia (PCEA) for pain after femur fracture surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）可能是股骨骨折术后镇痛的有效替代方案，特别是当硬膜外镇痛不适用时。在术后疼痛管理中，您可以考虑这一选项。
items.titleZh: 研究发现患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞是硬膜外镇痛的安全有效替代方案
items.summaryZh: 一项新的随机试验表明，患者自控腰部竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）是股骨骨折术后镇痛中患者自控硬膜外镇痛（PCEA）的安全有效替代方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that patient-controlled erector spinae plane block (ESPB) may be an effective alternative for postoperative analgesia following femur fracture surgery, especially when epidural analgesia is not suitable. You might consider this option in postoperative pain management.
items.limitation: 虽然是 RCT，但需关注样本量和长期结局。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, sample size and long-term outcomes need to be considered.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This article reviews the clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation, covering medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述全面回顾了神经机器人在神经康复领域的应用。如果你正在关注外骨骼和神经假肢等技术，这篇综述能帮你了解最新的临床进展和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 神经康复中的神经机器人技术：临床应用和未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本文综述了神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用和未来研究方向，包括医用外骨骼和神经假肢。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers a comprehensive overview of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation. If you are tracking technologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, this review provides insight into the latest clinical advancements and future research directions.
items.limitation: 综述文章，可能侧重于现有技术，缺乏对新方法或未成熟技术的深入探讨。
items.limitationEn: Review articles may focus on existing technologies, lacking in-depth discussion of new or nascent methods.

items.title: Ethical Considerations Toward Harmonizing Human and Machine Agency in Embodied Neurotechnologies
items.summary: This research discusses ethical considerations for harmonizing human and machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, which enhance functional agency for neurological patients.
items.curatedReason: 在使用外骨骼和神经假肢这类具身神经技术时，理解人机协同的伦理边界至关重要。本文从伦理层面剖析了这些技术在增强患者功能自主性时的考量，是你思考康复技术伦理不可或缺的参考。
items.titleZh: 具身神经技术中人机协同的伦理考量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究讨论了医用外骨骼和神经假肢等具身神经技术中人机协同的伦理考量，这些技术能增强神经系统疾病患者的功能能动性。
items.curatedReasonEn: When employing embodied neurotechnologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, understanding the ethical boundaries of human-machine agency is crucial. This article provides an ethical analysis of these technologies in enhancing patient functional autonomy, serving as an indispensable reference for considering rehabilitation technology ethics.
items.limitation: 伦理探讨可能包含较多概念性内容，具体实践指南较少。
items.limitationEn: Ethical discussions may contain more conceptual content with fewer specific practical guidelines.

items.title: Single leg vertical jump performance identifies knee function deficits ...
items.summary: This research indicates that single-leg vertical jump performance effectively identifies knee function deficits at return to sport after ACL reconstruction in male athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明单腿垂直跳跃表现可识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。将其纳入您的评估工具箱，以更精准地指导重返运动决策。
items.titleZh: 单腿垂直跳跃表现可识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项研究表明，单腿垂直跳跃表现能有效识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits in male athletes returning to sport after ACL reconstruction. Incorporate this into your assessment toolkit for more precise guidance on return-to-sport decisions.
items.limitation: 研究对象为男性运动员，结果对外推至女性或其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on male athletes; extrapolation to females or other populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Progressing rehabilitation after injury: consider the 'control-chaos ...
items.summary: This article proposes considering the 'control-chaos continuum' when progressing rehabilitation after injury, balancing early reintegration with reinjury risk.
items.curatedReason: “控制-混沌连续体”模型为损伤后的康复进展提供了新视角。这个概念框架可以帮助您在运动员重返运动训练中更好地平衡风险与负荷。
items.titleZh: 损伤后康复进展：考虑“控制-混沌连续体”
items.summaryZh: 本文提出在损伤后康复进展中应考虑“控制-混沌连续体”，以平衡早期重返训练与再损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 'control-chaos continuum' model offers a new perspective on rehabilitation progression after injury. This conceptual framework can help you better balance risk and load in athlete return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 该文章为述评，提出概念框架，但缺乏实证数据支持。
items.limitationEn: This article is a commentary proposing a conceptual framework, but lacks empirical data support.

items.title: All-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures: study
items.summary: A study found that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。在评估患者手术方案时，您可以将此作为一种潜在的选择。
items.titleZh: 研究：全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得满意效果
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation yields satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures. You can consider this as a potential option when evaluating surgical plans for patients.
items.limitation: 新闻报道未提供详细研究设计和样本量，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: News report does not provide detailed study design or sample size; likely an observational study.

items.title: High Prevalence of Visual Defects in Children with Cerebral Palsy, Suggests Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study revealed a 73.3% prevalence of visual defects closely correlated with severe neuroimaging changes in pediatric cerebral palsy patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究强调了脑瘫儿童视力缺陷的高患病率，并与神经影像学改变密切相关。这提示您在评估脑瘫儿童时，应将视力筛查和早期干预纳入常规考量。
items.titleZh: 研究表明脑瘫儿童视力缺陷患病率高
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究显示，小儿脑瘫患者中视力缺陷的患病率高达 73.3%，且与严重的神经影像学改变密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study highlights the high prevalence of visual defects in children with cerebral palsy, closely correlating with neuroimaging changes. This suggests that you should include vision screening and early intervention as routine considerations when assessing children with cerebral palsy.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.

items.title: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitat…
items.summary: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitators regarding virtual pelvic healthcare in individuals with gynecological cancers.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究方案关注妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好和障碍。它可能揭示远程医疗在盆腔康复领域的潜在作用和挑战。
items.titleZh: 妇科癌症患者虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素：一项以患者为导向的混合方法研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案旨在于采用以患者为导向的混合方法，探讨妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol focuses on preferences and barriers to virtual pelvic healthcare for gynecological cancer patients. It may reveal the potential role and challenges of telehealth in pelvic rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为协议，尚未发布最终结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; final results are not yet published.

items.title: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation
items.summary: This study found that Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation in a rat model.
items.curatedReason: 通腑醒神胶囊在动物模型中显示出通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中的潜力。记住，这只是动物研究，其临床转化路径漫长，目前尚不能指导人类卒中康复。
items.titleZh: 通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制焦亡介导的神经炎症改善缺血性卒中
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制焦亡介导的神经炎症，在大鼠模型中改善了缺血性卒中。
items.curatedReasonEn: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule shows potential in an animal model to ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation. As this is an animal study, its clinical translation pathway is long, and it currently cannot guide human stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 动物模型研究结果不直接适用于人体，仍需临床验证。
items.limitationEn: Animal model results are not directly applicable to humans and require clinical validation.

items.title: Efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT（curated score 70）提示远程缺血预处理可能改善血管内支架植入患者的脑血流调节。虽然有前景，但要将其作为神经保护的常规手段，还需要更多研究验证其确切机制和临床效益。
items.titleZh: 远程缺血预处理对血管内支架植入患者脑血流调节的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验研究了远程缺血预处理对血管内支架植入患者脑血流调节的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (curated score 70) suggests remote ischemic conditioning might improve cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting. While promising, further research is needed to validate its precise mechanisms and clinical benefits before it can become a routine neuroprotective measure.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和长期效益仍需进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: Clinical significance and long-term benefits of the findings require further evaluation.

items.title: Serum Biomarkers in Paediatric Neurosurgery: Traumatic Brain Injury and Beyond
items.summary: This chapter reviews serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, focusing on traumatic brain injury and other neurological conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这篇关于儿科神经外科血清生物标志物的综述，虽然主要关注创伤性脑损伤，但可能为您在儿童神经损伤的评估和预后方面提供新思路。
items.titleZh: 儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物：创伤性脑损伤及其他
items.summaryZh: 本章综述了儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物，重点关注创伤性脑损伤及其他神经系统疾病。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, though focused on traumatic brain injury, may offer new insights into the assessment and prognosis of neurological injuries in children.
items.limitation: 综述文章，总结现有证据，不提供新数据。
items.limitationEn: Review article, summarizes existing evidence, does not provide new data.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon (N=94 children aged 3-60 months) found that only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence (≥50% of sessions completed).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的观察研究显示，当地仅有 38.3% 的脑瘫患儿能在 5 个月前开始物理治疗，且依从性良好的也仅有 38.3%。这提示我们，在资源有限的地区，早期干预和依从性仍是巨大挑战；你需要思考你的患者群体是否也面临类似的可及性障碍。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性与依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究（N=94，3-60月龄脑瘫患儿）显示，仅38.3%的患儿能早期（5月龄前）获得物理治疗，且只有38.3%的患儿有良好依从性（完成≥50%的治疗计划）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Cameroon reveals that only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy before 5 months, and only 38.3% showed good adherence. This suggests early intervention and adherence remain significant challenges in resource-constrained settings; consider if your patient population faces similar accessibility barriers.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面观察性设计，难以确立因果关系，且数据主要来自单一中心和照护者访谈，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional observational study cannot establish causality and relies heavily on data from a single center and caregiver interviews, which may introduce recall bias.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined how pediatric physiotherapists (N=6) used focus of attention for instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions for children with neurodevelopmental disorders (N=12), providing direct insights into practical application.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究首次直接观察远程儿科物理治疗中“注意力焦点”的使用，填补了自我报告数据中的空白。它能让你更清晰地认识到远程治疗中语言指令在运动学习中的实际应用方式。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中指令与反馈的注意力焦点应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师（N=6）在为神经发育障碍儿童（N=12）提供远程治疗时，如何使用注意力焦点进行指令和反馈，为实际应用提供了直接见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study, for the first time, directly observed the use of "focus of attention" in telerehabilitation for pediatric physiotherapy, filling a gap in self-report data. It offers clearer insights into how verbal instructions are practically applied in motor learning during telerehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本探索性观察研究（6位治疗师，12位客户），无法得出普遍性结论，且未评估不同注意力焦点策略对治疗结局的影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample exploratory observational study (6 therapists, 12 clients), which limits generalizability and did not evaluate the impact of different focus of attention strategies on treatment outcomes.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time when compared to video truth data.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测器在住院患者和健康老年人中显示出良好准确性。如果你所在机构正考虑在急性期护理中量化患者活动，这款设备提供了客观、易用的新选择，值得评估其临床价值。
items.titleZh: 验证急性期患者活动监测器：PREEMPT 的效用
items.summaryZh: PREEMPT 活动监测器在10名健康老年人和46名住院患者中得到验证，与视频真实数据相比，在测量步长、步数、行走时间、久坐时间和活动时间方面均表现出准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor shows good accuracy in hospitalized patients and healthy older adults. If your facility is considering quantifying patient activity in acute care, this device offers a new objective and user-friendly option worth evaluating for its clinical value.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（46例住院患者，10位健康老年人），且未评估长期使用情况或对临床结局的预测能力。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (46 hospitalized patients, 10 healthy older adults) and did not evaluate long-term use or its predictive capability for clinical outcomes.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic RCT (N=350 cancer survivors) found that an 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation program was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项大型 RCT 明确指出，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估与建议。这意味着，不要过度承诺远程方案的增量效益，其价值可能更多在于可及性而非疗效的显著提升。
items.titleZh: 癌症远程运动康复安全但生活质量改善不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法、实用型随机对照试验（N=350名癌症幸存者）发现，为期8周的团体运动型远程康复项目安全，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large RCT clearly states that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice for improving quality of life. This means you should not over-promise incremental benefits of telerehabilitation; its value may lie more in accessibility than significantly enhanced efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究的对照组干预强度较低（单次面对面评估和建议），可能未能充分反映标准物理治疗的全部效果，从而限制了对远程康复优越性的评估。
items.limitationEn: The control group intervention (single in-person assessment and advice) was of lower intensity, which might not fully reflect the total effect of standard physiotherapy, thus limiting the assessment of telerehabilitation's superiority.

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, highlighting a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocols between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述强调了慢性卒中上肢康复领域，尤其是在对侧 C7 神经移植和高剂量/技术辅助康复之间，康复方案缺乏直接比较和详细描述。这意味着目前临床实践中很多方案的疗效比较尚无高等级证据支持，为未来研究指明了方向。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项针对有无神经移植患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述识别了慢性卒中康复策略中的差距，尤其指出对侧 C7 神经移植与技术辅助/高剂量康复之间在康复方案的直接比较和详细描述方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocol descriptions in chronic stroke upper limb rehabilitation, especially between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and high-dose/technology-assisted rehabilitation. This implies that many current clinical practices lack high-level evidence for comparative efficacy, pointing to clear directions for future research.
items.limitation: 综述指出，现有研究缺乏对康复剂量、内容和交付模式的详细描述和直接比较，限制了综合评估和明确建议的能力。
items.limitationEn: The review points out that existing studies lack detailed descriptions and direct comparisons of rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models, limiting its ability to provide comprehensive assessment and clear recommendations.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital found that musculoskeletal disorders are common, with diverse patterns and associated costs. Treatment effectiveness for pain was calculated.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的真实世界研究揭示了肌肉骨骼疾病在当地的患病率、治疗模式、效果及成本。尽管样本量大，但作为回顾性观察研究，其证据等级不足以指导临床干预决策，更多是提供背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果与成本
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚一所大学教学医院 1582 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者进行的长达 10 年回顾性研究发现，该类疾病患病率高，模式多样，并涉及可观的治疗成本和疼痛干预效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This real-world study from Nigeria provides insights into the prevalence, treatment patterns, effectiveness, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders locally. While the sample size is large, as a retrospective observational study, its evidence level is not sufficient to guide clinical intervention decisions but rather offers valuable background information.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察性设计，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素风险，且数据来源单一，限制了结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study is a retrospective observational design, which carries risks of selection bias and confounding factors. The single data source also limits the generalizability of its conclusions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in cycling, moving beyond traditional injury incidence to provide insight into the relative severity of race-related events.
items.curatedReason: 该论文提出了一个针对自行车比赛中事故严重程度的复合评分框架。这个工具对于未来运动损伤监测、风险评估和预防策略的制定具有潜在价值，能帮助您更精细地评估比赛风险。
items.titleZh: 自行车比赛中种族相关事件的复合严重性评分
items.summaryZh: 本论文提出了一种针对自行车比赛中事件严重程度的监测框架，旨在超越传统的损伤发生率，提供对比赛相关事件相对严重性的深入洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper proposes a composite severity score framework for race-related incidents in cycling. This tool has potential value for future sports injury surveillance, risk assessment, and prevention strategy development, helping you to evaluate competition risks more precisely.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This protocol describes an N-of-1 trial using an mHealth intervention with behavior change techniques to improve physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older patients with cancer, employing a single-subject ABA' design.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，目前尚无结果。如果后续证实 mHealth 行为干预有效，这能提示我们居家康复的老年癌症患者，可考虑用这种个性化、基于技术的方案来改善体力活动和营养状况。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者体力活动和营养的移动健康干预：一项 N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 这项方案描述了一项 N-of-1 试验，旨在通过采用单受试者 ABA' 设计的移动健康干预和行为改变技术，改善老年癌症患者的体力活动和营养行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol, with no results yet. If subsequent findings confirm mHealth behavioral interventions are effective, it would suggest that older cancer patients in home-based rehabilitation could consider such personalized, technology-based approaches to improve physical activity and nutritional status.
items.limitation: N-of-1 试验虽能提供个体化证据，但其小样本量和单中心设计限制了结果的普适性，外推至更广泛人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: While N-of-1 trials provide individualized evidence, their small sample size and single-center design limit generalizability. Extrapolating to broader populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients found that incomplete routine cognitive assessments can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使卒中后认知评估数据不完整，通过特定方法仍能提取出具有临床意义的关系，这对于数据不完善的临床环境有实用价值。但请记住，不完整数据下的结论仍需谨慎对待。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名急性期后卒中患者进行的回顾性队列研究发现，即使常规认知评估数据不完整，仍能从中恢复认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that even with incomplete post-stroke cognitive assessment data, clinically interpretable relationships can be extracted using specific methods, offering practical value for settings with imperfect data. However, exercise caution with conclusions drawn from incomplete datasets.
items.limitation: 研究依赖回顾性数据，可能存在记录偏倚和未记录的混杂因素，且结果的解释性仍需临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on retrospective data, which may involve recording bias and unrecorded confounding factors, and the interpretability of the results requires further clinical validation.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This article discusses the need for boxing to adopt technology and data-driven approaches to improve athlete health and performance, particularly in managing the inevitable head impacts and moving beyond intuition-based practices.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论文章强调了拳击运动在科技、健康和表现方面需要改进，特别是如何更好地管理脑部冲击。它指出了从直觉转向数据驱动决策的必要性，这在任何高强度运动康复中都有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：科技、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了拳击运动需要采纳技术和数据驱动方法以提升运动员健康和表现，特别是在管理不可避免的头部冲击方面，并摆脱基于直觉的实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the need for improvements in boxing regarding technology, health, and performance, particularly in better managing head impacts. It points out the necessity of shifting from intuition to data-driven decisions, which has implications for rehabilitation in any high-intensity sport.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over conventional low-load exercise (LLE) and is comparable to high-load exercise (HLE) in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 遇到肌骨患者的肌力、残疾或疼痛问题，别再局限于传统低负荷训练了。这项高质量系统综述提示，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）效果优于传统低负荷训练，且能达到高负荷训练的效果，尤其适用于无法承受高负荷的患者。
items.titleZh: 与常规肌骨康复训练相比，血流限制训练是否提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，在肌骨疾病患者中，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛方面优于传统低负荷训练（LLE），且与高负荷训练（HLE）效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with musculoskeletal conditions struggling with muscle strength, disability, or pain, reconsider conventional low-load exercise. This high-quality systematic review suggests LLE-BFR is superior to conventional low-load exercise and comparable to high-load exercise, especially beneficial for those unable to tolerate high loads.
items.limitation: 未明确报告纳入研究的异质性程度和整体证据质量分级。
items.limitationEn: The degree of heterogeneity among included studies and the overall GRADE evidence quality were not explicitly reported.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found good agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared with senior physicians in the emergency department for musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在急诊科（ED）环境中，高级物理治疗师与医生在肌骨功能障碍的诊断和治疗决策上具有良好的一致性。这意味着物理治疗师可以安全有效地承担 ED 初筛角色，能显著缓解 ED 压力，并在你未来的执业范围拓展中提供支持。
items.titleZh: 肌骨功能障碍诊断和治疗的一线共识：一项前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，在急诊科处理肌骨疾病时，物理治疗师与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策方面与资深医师有良好的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates good agreement between advanced physiotherapists and physicians on diagnosis and treatment decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions in the emergency department (ED). This suggests that physiotherapists can safely and effectively assume an ED triage role, significantly alleviating ED pressure, and supporting future scope of practice expansion.
items.limitation: 研究仅在一家医院的急诊科进行，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital ED, which may limit the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI) whose exercise therapy was effectively facilitated through figure-of-eight taping.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了八字形贴扎如何辅助一名年轻空手道运动员的多方向肩关节不稳康复训练。作为个案，它仅提供初步观察，请勿将其外推为常规治疗策略。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期空手道女运动员多方向肩关节不稳：一病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告描述了一名 12 岁患有多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）的空手道女运动员，其运动疗法通过八字形贴扎得到了有效辅助。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates how figure-of-eight taping facilitated rehabilitation for a young karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability. As a case study, it offers preliminary observations but should not be generalized as a routine treatment strategy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with very limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A study with 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults found that custom peak-detection algorithms, especially with ankle or hip-worn ActiGraph accelerometers, provided superior accuracy for step count estimation compared to manufacturer's algorithms in post-stroke individuals, particularly at lower walking speeds.
items.curatedReason: 如果你需要通过可穿戴设备精确测量卒中患者的步数，考虑使用脚踝或臀部佩戴的 ActiGraph 加速度计，并使用自定义峰值检测算法。制造商的 ActiLife 算法在卒中人群中的准确性相对较低。
items.titleZh: 通过多种可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估计：一项卒中和健康成人验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 18 名卒中患者和 18 名健康成人的研究发现，与制造商算法相比，使用定制峰值检测算法（尤其是在脚踝或臀部佩戴 ActiGraph 加速度计）在卒中患者中，特别是在较低步行速度下，能提供更准确的步数估计。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you need to accurately measure step counts in post-stroke patients using wearable devices, consider ankle or hip-worn ActiGraph accelerometers with a custom peak-detection algorithm. The manufacturer's ActiLife algorithm shows relatively lower accuracy in this population.
items.limitation: 这项验证研究的样本量相对较小（18 名卒中患者和 18 名健康成人），且所有参与者都来自同一机构，可能影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: This validation study has a relatively small sample size (18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults), and all participants were from the same institution, which may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social participation) and corresponding valid PROMs has been developed for pediatric physical therapy through focus groups, interviews, a scoping review, and expert panel consensus.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗有了核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）的推荐。这意味着你在日常实践、研究和质量评估中，可以更有依据地选择标准化工具，从而更好地评估干预效果和患者体验，提升诊疗质量。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 通过焦点小组、访谈、范围界定综述和专家小组共识，儿科物理治疗已开发出一套包含九个患者报告结局（PROs）的核心集，这些结局分为三个领域（功能、总体幸福感和社会参与），并包含相应的有效 PROMs。
items.curatedReasonEn: Recommended core patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) are now available for pediatric physical therapy. This means you can select standardized tools with greater confidence for daily practice, research, and quality assessment, thereby better evaluating intervention effectiveness and patient experience, and improving care quality.
items.limitation: 核心结局集的开发过程中，患者和家长参与度有限，且专家小组和调查问卷主要集中在荷兰，可能导致结果在其他文化和医疗体系中的普适性受限。
items.limitationEn: Patient and parent involvement in the core outcome set development was limited, and the expert panel and survey were primarily focused in the Netherlands, potentially limiting the generalizability of results to other cultures and healthcare systems.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial provides a follow-up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 2018 年 IOC 关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明已发布后续更新，这代表了该领域的最新进展和挑战。在处理儿童 ACL 损伤时，你应参考最新的指南，拓宽你的护理视野，确保为患儿提供全面的、长期的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 2018 年 IOC 儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理愿景
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论是对 2018 年 IOC 儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续，旨在审视预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期整体护理方面的新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries has a follow-up, representing the latest advances and challenges in the field. When managing pediatric ACL injuries, you should refer to the updated guidelines to broaden your care perspective and ensure comprehensive, long-term rehabilitation strategies for young patients.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of studies up to December 2024 estimated the pooled prevalence of disordered eating (DE) in athletes at 29% (95% CI: 0.25–0.33) and eating disorders (EDs) at 6% (95% CI: 0.04–0.08). Female athletes and those in aesthetic/endurance sports showed higher prevalence.
items.curatedReason: 运动员中紊乱性进食（DE）的总体患病率高达 29%，而临床诊断的进食障碍（EDs）为 6%。尤其是女性运动员和参与美学/耐力项目的运动员，其患病率更高。作为康复专业人士，你必须主动筛查高风险人群，并将营养咨询和心理支持整合到康复计划中。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项截至 2024 年 12 月的系统综述和荟萃分析估计，运动员中紊乱性进食（DE）的汇总患病率为 29%（95% CI: 0.25–0.33），饮食失调（EDs）为 6%（95% CI: 0.04–0.08）。女性运动员以及从事审美/耐力运动的运动员患病率更高。
items.curatedReasonEn: Disordered eating (DE) affects 29% of athletes, with clinically diagnosed eating disorders (EDs) at 6%. Female athletes and those in aesthetic/endurance sports exhibit higher prevalence. As rehabilitation professionals, you must actively screen high-risk populations and integrate nutritional counseling and psychological support into rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 虽然是系统综述和荟萃分析，但纳入的研究在评估方法、诊断标准和人群特征上存在异质性，可能影响总体患病率估计的精确性和可比性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review and meta-analysis, the included studies exhibited heterogeneity in assessment methods, diagnostic criteria, and population characteristics, which may affect the precision and comparability of overall prevalence estimates.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicentre retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients (316 ischemic, 249 hemorrhagic) found that admission Berg Balance Scale (BBS) scores independently predicted independent walking at discharge. Optimal cut-off values were derived: 13.5 for ischemic stroke (AUC=0.858) and 12.5 for hemorrhagic stroke (AUC=0.871).
items.curatedReason: Berg 平衡量表（BBS）在卒中住院康复初期就能有效预测出院时的独立步行能力，特别是针对不同卒中亚型（缺血性 vs. 出血性）有特异性截断值。在你评估患者预后时，结合这些亚型特异性数值能提高预测准确性。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立步行的亚型特异性最佳截断值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 565 名卒中患者（316 名缺血性，249 名出血性）的多中心回顾性队列研究发现，入院时的 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）得分可独立预测出院时的独立步行能力。研究得出了最佳截断值：缺血性卒中为 13.5 分（AUC=0.858），出血性卒中为 12.5 分（AUC=0.871）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Berg Balance Scale (BBS) at admission for stroke inpatient rehabilitation effectively predicts independent walking ability at discharge, with subtype-specific cut-off values for ischemic vs. hemorrhagic stroke. When assessing patient prognosis, incorporating these subtype-specific values can improve predictive accuracy.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，尽管样本量较大，但由于数据收集的固有局限性，可能存在未测量的混杂因素。此外，研究在韩国进行，其结果在不同医疗系统和人群中的普适性需谨慎评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study. Despite a large sample size, unmeasured confounders may exist due to inherent data collection limitations. Additionally, the study was conducted in South Korea, and the generalizability of its findings to different healthcare systems and populations should be cautiously evaluated.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process involving 83 participants from various tennis governing bodies and the broader ecosystem generated recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors.
items.curatedReason: 网球界多组织合作制定了精英运动员（含青少年）心理健康促进与护理建议。这提示我们在康复工作中，应将心理健康支持纳入网球运动员的整体管理，并强调跨学科合作的重要性。
items.titleZh: 网球界的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项由网球界各管理机构和生态系统 83 名参与者组成的混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程，为精英网球运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和健康促进制定了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: The tennis community's collaborative recommendations for elite athletes' (including juniors) mental healthcare and wellness promotion suggest integrating mental health support into the overall management of tennis players during rehabilitation, underscoring the importance of interdisciplinary collaboration.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective cohort study at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games monitored 4450 athletes over 14 days, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence=10.9%) and an incidence of 8.6 injuries per 1000 athlete days. Taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) had the highest injury incidences.
items.curatedReason: 巴黎 2024 残奥会的数据显示，残疾运动员在 14 天内受伤总发生率为 10.9%，平均每千运动员日 8.6 次受伤。其中，跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）的受伤发生率最高。这提示我们，在为这些高风险项目的残疾运动员设计预防和康复方案时，必须重点关注其专项伤病模式。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病和疾病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与特定运动风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对巴黎 2024 残奥会的预期队列研究在 14 天内监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（患病率为 10.9%），伤病发生率为每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例。其中跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）的伤病发生率最高。
items.curatedReasonEn: Data from the Paris 2024 Paralympics shows a 10.9% overall injury prevalence among para-athletes over 14 days, with an incidence of 8.6 injuries per 1000 athlete days. Taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) had the highest injury incidences. This suggests that prevention and rehabilitation programs for para-athletes in these high-risk sports must specifically target their sport-specific injury patterns.
items.limitation: 该研究是在残奥会期间进行的短时间（14 天）监测，可能无法捕捉到长期或慢性伤病，且数据依赖于医疗设施的记录和运动员的报告，可能存在漏报。
items.limitationEn: This study involved short-term (14-day) monitoring during the Paralympic Games, which may not capture long-term or chronic injuries. Data also relied on medical facility records and athlete reports, potentially leading to underreporting.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A study with 27 stroke patients found that spatial prioritized instructions immediately improved step length (p=0.001) and walking speed (p=0.003), while temporal prioritization primarily enhanced rhythm (p<0.001), compared to no prioritization.
items.curatedReason: 空间优先指令能立即改善卒中患者的步长和步速，时间优先指令则主要改善节律。这提示你在步态训练中，针对性地调整口头指令的侧重点，可以更精准地靶向步态参数，提高训练效率。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者空间和时间优先口头指令对步态时空参数的影响：一项组内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的研究发现，空间优先指令立即改善了步长（p=0.001）和步行速度（p=0.003），而时间优先指令主要增强了节律（p<0.001），这些效果均优于无优先指令对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: Spatial prioritization instructions immediately improve step length and velocity in stroke patients, while temporal prioritization mainly improves rhythm. This suggests that specifically adjusting the focus of verbal instructions during gait training can more precisely target gait parameters, enhancing training efficiency.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的组内重复测量研究，尽管有随机条件，但长期效果和在更大、更多样化人群中的普适性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample within-subject repeated-measures study. While conditions were randomized, long-term effects and generalizability to larger, more diverse populations require further validation.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study found it feasible to integrate music therapy into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting, with preliminary results suggesting potential improvements in language performance (Western Aphasia Battery-Thai Adaptation scores increased by 6.7 points on average in the music therapy group vs. 3.2 in standard care).
items.curatedReason: 卒中后失语症患者在常规言语治疗中整合音乐疗法是可行的。虽然这是一项可行性研究，但它提示音乐疗法作为一种辅助手段，可能有助于改善语言表现，值得在临床路径中考虑。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症常规言语康复中的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验性研究发现，在门诊环境中将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症的常规言语治疗中是可行的，初步结果表明语言表现可能有所改善（音乐治疗组的西方失语症量表-泰语适应版得分平均增加 6.7 分，而标准护理组为 3.2 分）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating music therapy into routine speech-language rehabilitation for post-stroke aphasia is feasible. Although this is a feasibility study, it suggests that music therapy, as an adjunctive method, may help improve language performance and is worth considering in clinical pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项准实验性可行性研究，未随机分组，实验组可能因总治疗时间增加而受益，而非单一音乐疗法效应。且研究在单一门诊进行，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental feasibility study without randomization, and the experimental group might have benefited from increased overall therapeutic contact time, not solely from music therapy. The study was also conducted in a single outpatient clinic, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial highlights the critical need for organizational leadership in proactively addressing athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive responses to crises. It emphasizes that mental health is an integral component of overall well-being, often overlooked in high-performance sports environments.
items.curatedReason: 竞技体育中运动员心理健康的重要性日益凸显，这篇文章强调了组织领导层在主动促进运动员心理健康方面的作用。作为运动康复领域的PT，你不仅要关注运动员的身体康复，更要意识到其所处组织的文化和支持系统对心理健康的影响，并可尝试在此层面提供支持。
items.titleZh: 建立基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调，组织领导层在主动解决运动员心理健康问题方面至关重要，应超越被动的危机应对。它强调心理健康是整体幸福不可或缺的组成部分，但在高水平体育环境中常被忽视。
items.curatedReasonEn: The importance of athlete mental health in competitive sports is growing, and this article emphasizes the role of organizational leadership in proactively promoting it. As a PT in sports rehabilitation, you should not only focus on physical recovery but also recognize the impact of the organizational culture and support system on mental health, and consider providing support at this level.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This editorial highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance-state after returning to sport following ACL reconstruction is a significant challenge, as many athletes experience long-term neuromuscular and sport performance impairments despite passing return-to-sport criteria.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后运动员重返赛场后的表现状态监测是一个持续的挑战。这篇社论提醒你，即使运动员通过了重返赛场标准，也需要对其神经肌肉功能和运动表现进行长期监测，因为他们仍可能面临继发性损伤和长期功能障碍的风险。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返赛场后的表现状态是一个重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论指出，在 ACL 重建术后运动员重返赛场后，监测其表现状态是一个重大挑战，因为尽管他们通过了重返赛场标准，许多运动员仍会经历长期的神经肌肉和运动表现障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Monitoring athletes' performance status after returning to sport following an ACL injury remains a challenge. This editorial reminds you that even if athletes meet return-to-sport criteria, long-term monitoring of their neuromuscular function and sport performance is necessary, as they may still be at risk for subsequent injuries and long-term impairments.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections found that median time to return-to-training (RTT) was 3.5 days, return-to-full-training (RTFT) was 8 days, and return-to-full-performance (RTFP) was 11 days. Illness severity (moderate/severe vs. mild) was associated with longer RTFP (HR=0.45).
items.curatedReason: 急性呼吸道感染后，运动员重返训练的中位时间为 3.5 天，完全恢复表现则需 11 天。疾病严重程度与完全恢复表现时间延长相关。指导运动员康复时，务必根据个体病情，特别是疾病严重程度，循序渐进地安排负荷，以防过早复训引发反复。
items.titleZh: 运动员病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动结局相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究发现，重返训练（RTT）的中位时间为 3.5 天，重返完全训练（RTFT）为 8 天，重返完全表现（RTFP）为 11 天。疾病严重程度（中度/重度 vs. 轻度）与更长的 RTFP 相关（HR=0.45）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Following acute respiratory infections, athletes return-to-training in a median of 3.5 days, but return-to-full-performance takes 11 days. Illness severity is linked to a longer return-to-full-performance. When guiding athlete rehabilitation, ensure a progressive load based on individual illness, especially severity, to prevent premature return-to-play issues.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心前瞻性队列研究，且大部分运动员来自团体运动项目，这可能限制了结果对其他运动类型和不同人群的普适性。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center prospective cohort study, and most athletes were from team sports, which may limit the generalizability of results to other sports types and populations.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on young athletes' mental health, highlighting both risks and opportunities, and suggesting future directions for research and practice in this rapidly evolving digital context.
items.curatedReason: 社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的影响是一个复杂且日益重要的话题。在康复过程中，除了关注身体机能，也需要意识到数字环境可能带来的心理风险和机遇，这有助于你更全面地理解和支持年轻运动员的康复过程。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的双重影响，强调了其风险与机遇，并为这一快速发展的数字环境中的研究和实践提出了未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: The influence of social media on young athletes' mental health is a complex and increasingly important topic. During rehabilitation, besides focusing on physical function, it's crucial to be aware of the psychological risks and opportunities presented by the digital environment. This understanding will help you comprehensively support young athletes' recovery.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis (n=62,217 Medicare beneficiaries) found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model impacted the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement.
items.curatedReason: 强制捆绑支付（CJR）模式对美国 Medicare 受益人的下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付产生了影响。这项研究告诉你，在新的报销环境下，如何调整服务模式以确保患者能获得术前康复。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项双重差分分析（涉及62,217名 Medicare 受益人）发现，全面关节置换护理 (CJR) 捆绑支付模式影响了提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: The mandatory bundled payment (CJR) model has impacted prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement among Medicare beneficiaries in the US. This study informs you on how to adapt service models in new reimbursement environments to ensure patients receive prehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究基于 Medicare 索赔数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有临床实践细节，且结果仅适用于美国 Medicare 系统。
items.limitationEn: The study is based on Medicare claims data, which may not fully capture all clinical practice details, and results are applicable only to the US Medicare system.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device, Hand Stretcher®, significantly improved flexor spasticity and hand function in patients with chronic stroke after 4 weeks of use.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 30 例患者的初步 RCT 提示，动态腕手牵伸器械可能有效改善慢性卒中患者的屈肌痉挛和手功能。如果未来有更大规模研究证实，它将成为一个有前景的居家或辅助治疗工具。
items.titleZh: 使用动态腕手牵伸器械改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛的初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项初步随机对照试验（n=30）发现，新型动态腕手牵伸器械 Hand Stretcher® 在使用4周后显著改善了慢性卒中患者的屈肌痉挛和手部功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT with 30 patients suggests a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device may effectively reduce flexor spasticity and improve hand function in chronic stroke patients. If larger studies confirm these findings, consider it a promising adjunctive or home therapy tool.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本（n=30）的初步随机对照试验，随访期仅4周，结果需通过更大规模和长期研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample (n=30) pilot randomized controlled trial with only a 4-week follow-up, requiring validation from larger, longer-term studies.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review identified and analyzed weighted criteria for return-to-play after hamstring injury, highlighting the lack of clear consensus and the high recurrence rate of such injuries.
items.curatedReason: 如果你还在用单一时间节点决定腿筋伤后能不能上场，该停了——这篇系统综述再次确认，目前根本没有公认的加权重返标准，再伤率依旧高企。下一步：参照已梳理的加权框架做多维度评估，别再只盯一个指标。
items.titleZh: 腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述识别并分析了腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，强调了缺乏明确共识和高复发率的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you're still clearing hamstring injuries based on a single time point, stop. This review confirms there's no consensus on weighted return-to-play criteria—and re-injury rates remain stubbornly high. Use the synthesized weighted frameworks to drive multi-dimensional decisions, not just one milestone.
items.limitation: 本系统综述发现现有研究在重返运动标准上缺乏统一共识，且方法学质量分析揭示了潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review found a lack of unified consensus on return-to-play criteria in existing studies, and methodological quality analysis revealed potential biases.

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection through an explorative literature search and a two-stage consensus procedure involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists.
items.curatedReason: 这份基于专家共识的协议为巨型假体置换术后骨肿瘤患者提供了物理治疗方案，填补了该领域实践依据的空白。尽管是共识而非高级别证据，但你可以将其作为规范临床实践的起点。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过探索性文献检索和两阶段的骨科肿瘤外科医生与物理治疗师共识程序，制定了骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This expert consensus protocol provides much-needed physical therapy guidelines for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection. While not an RCT, it offers a valuable starting point for standardizing care in this complex patient population.
items.limitation: 本协议基于专家共识和探索性文献检索，缺乏随机对照试验等高级别证据支持。
items.limitationEn: This protocol is based on expert consensus and an exploratory literature search, lacking support from high-level evidence like RCTs.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the expectations and experiences of patients with hip or knee osteoarthritis regarding physical therapist-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, identifying areas for improvement in shared decision-making.
items.curatedReason: PT 主导的骨关节炎分诊模式，患者体验和参与决策是关键。了解患者期望能帮助你优化沟通和诊疗流程，提高满意度。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验，旨在优化共享决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patient experience and shared decision-making are key in PT-led OA triage. Understanding patient expectations can help you optimize communication and clinical processes to improve satisfaction.
items.limitation: 本研究采用定性设计，样本量较小，结果可能不具有普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a qualitative design with a small sample size, and the results may not be generalizable.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD research explored the responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system to different heat stress conditions in vivo, focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit.
items.curatedReason: 这项关于热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学影响的博士研究，对你理解运动员在高温环境下的适应和损伤风险有参考价值。你可以据此调整训练和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探讨了在不同热应激条件下，神经肌肉和肌肉-肌腱系统在体内的反应，重点关注腓肠肌内侧肌肉-肌腱单元。
items.curatedReasonEn: This doctoral research on the impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics is valuable for understanding athlete adaptation and injury risk in hot environments. You can adjust training and rehabilitation strategies accordingly.
items.limitation: 本研究主要关注腓肠肌内侧肌肉-肌腱单元，结果的普遍性可能有限，且试验条件为实验室热暴露。
items.limitationEn: This study primarily focused on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, which may limit generalizability, and experimental conditions involved laboratory heat exposure.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial aimed to evaluate the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly patients undergoing cardiac surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实，围手术期呼吸肌锻炼能够改善老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力，并可能改善预后。你应该将呼吸肌锻炼更常规地纳入此类患者的围手术期康复方案。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌锻炼对老年心脏手术患者有效性的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估围手术期呼吸肌锻炼对老年心脏手术患者呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that perioperative respiratory muscle training improves respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients, with potential for better prognostic outcomes. You should more routinely integrate respiratory muscle training into perioperative rehabilitation protocols for this population.
items.limitation: 本研究尽管是 RCT，但需关注其样本量、具体干预方案细节和长期随访结果，以评估其广泛适用性。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, its generalizability requires consideration of sample size, specific intervention details, and long-term follow-up results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: This scoping review mapped the application of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation, characterizing populations and contexts, and identifying methodological gaps.
items.curatedReason: eGVI 作为步态变异的综合指标，可能为神经和老年康复提供更全面的风险评估。了解其应用范围和局限性，有助于你在实践中考虑引入。
items.titleZh: 神经与老年康复中增强型步态变异指数 (eGVI) 的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在绘制增强型步态变异指数 (eGVI) 在神经和老年康复中的应用情况，描述了适用人群和临床背景，并识别了方法学空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: eGVI, as a composite gait variability index, may offer a more comprehensive risk assessment in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. Understanding its scope and limitations can help you consider its adoption in practice.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，本研究侧重于映射现有证据，未进行证据质量评估或荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study focused on mapping existing evidence and did not assess evidence quality or conduct a meta-analysis.

items.curatedReason: 这项勘误纠正了由国际运动物理治疗联合会（IFSPT）发起的关于临床实践中体力活动评估、处方和推广的共识研究。它提醒你，即使是共识文件，细节也可能更新，需关注最新版本。
items.titleZh: 勘误：ACTIVATE：国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的临床实践中体力活动评估、处方和推广共识研究

It reminds you that even consensus documents can have updates, so stay informed with the latest versions.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey assessed knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness among professional football stakeholders in Cameroon, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了非洲足球运动中猝死预防准备的系统性差距。作为运动物理治疗师，你需要了解并倡导更完善的急救方案，以保障运动员安全。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球运动中猝死预防准备：喀麦隆的证据及对全球运动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查评估了喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者对猝死预防准备的知识、态度和实践，旨在识别低资源运动环境中的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights systemic gaps in sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football. As a sports physical therapist, you need to understand and advocate for improved emergency protocols to ensure athlete safety.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，仅反映了单一时间点的知识、态度和实践，且样本来自特定国家（喀麦隆），外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey reflecting knowledge, attitudes, and practices at a single point in time, and the sample is from a specific country (Cameroon), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: Muscle injuries are among the most common injuries in sport. 1 Despite their high prevalence, muscle injuries remain complex in their aetiology, arising from multiple interacting external and internal
items.curatedReason: 这份运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析信息图，直观展示了定性和定量情境特征，有助于你从宏观和微观层面理解损伤机制，从而更精准地优化预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图：运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌肉群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 本信息图通过视频分析展示了运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征，旨在增进对损伤机制的理解，以开发有效的预防和康复策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic on sports muscle strains, derived from video analysis, visually breaks down both qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics. It will help you grasp injury mechanisms at both macro and micro levels, optimizing prevention and rehabilitation strategies more precisely.
items.limitation: 本信息图基于现有视频分析数据，但具体数据来源和证据等级未详细说明。
items.limitationEn: This infographic is based on existing video analysis data, but the specific data sources and evidence levels are not detailed.

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: This institution-based cross-sectional study in Northwest Ethiopia assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors, using a structured questionnaire and medical record review.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了埃塞俄比亚卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率的影响因素。虽然是区域性数据，但能帮助你反思自身执业环境中患者依从性和服务可及性问题。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔镇卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及相关因素
items.summaryZh: 这项在埃塞俄比亚西北部进行的机构内横断面研究，通过结构化问卷和病历回顾，评估了卒中幸存者物理治疗服务的利用率及其相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study sheds light on factors influencing physiotherapy service utilization among stroke survivors in Ethiopia. Though regional, it can prompt reflection on patient adherence and service accessibility in your own practice environment.
items.limitation: 本研究为机构内横断面研究，难以建立因果关系，且结果可能无法直接推广到其他地理或医疗系统。
items.limitationEn: This is an institution-based cross-sectional study, limiting the establishment of causal relationships and generalizability to other geographic or healthcare systems.
